pyepo.model.mpax.mpaxmodel
==========================

.. py:module:: pyepo.model.mpax.mpaxmodel

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Abstract optimization model based on MPAX



Attributes
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.model.mpax.mpaxmodel.num_vars


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   pyepo.model.mpax.mpaxmodel.optMpaxModel


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: optMpaxModel(A: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | None = None, b: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | None = None, G: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | None = None, h: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | None = None, l: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | None = None, u: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | None = None, use_sparse_matrix: bool = True, minimize: bool = True)

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.opt.optModel`


   This is an abstract class for an MPAX-based optimization model

   :ivar A: The matrix of equality constraints.
   :vartype A: jnp.ndarray, BCOO or BCSR
   :ivar b: The right hand side of equality constraints.
   :vartype b: jnp.ndarray
   :ivar G: The matrix for inequality constraints.
   :vartype G: jnp.ndarray, BCOO or BCSR
   :ivar h: The right hand side of inequality constraints.
   :vartype h: jnp.ndarray
   :ivar l: The lower bound of the variables.
   :vartype l: jnp.ndarray
   :ivar u: The upper bound of the variables.
   :vartype u: jnp.ndarray
   :ivar use_sparse_matrix: Whether to use sparse matrix format, by default True.
   :vartype use_sparse_matrix: bool
   :ivar minimize: Whether to minimize objective, by default True.

   :vartype minimize: bool


   .. py:attribute:: l


   .. py:attribute:: u


   .. py:attribute:: use_sparse_matrix
      :value: True



   .. py:attribute:: modelSense


   .. py:attribute:: device
      :value: None



   .. py:property:: num_cost
      :type: int


      number of costs to be predicted


   .. py:method:: setObj(c: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | list) -> None

      A method to set the objective function

      :param c: cost of objective function



   .. py:method:: solve() -> tuple[torch.Tensor, float]

      A method to solve the model

      :returns: optimal solution (torch.Tensor) and objective value (float)
      :rtype: tuple



   .. py:method:: copy() -> optMpaxModel

      A method to copy the model

      :returns: new copied model
      :rtype: optModel



   .. py:method:: addConstr(coefs: numpy.ndarray | torch.Tensor | list, rhs: float) -> optMpaxModel

      A method to add a new constraint

      :param coefs: coefficients of new constraint
      :param rhs: right-hand side of new constraint

      :returns: new model with the added constraint
      :rtype: optModel



.. py:data:: num_vars
   :value: 10
